sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_base64 (id UInt32, encoded_url String);
SELECT id, base64URLDecode(encoded_url) AS decoded_url FROM test_base64;
UPDATE test_base64 SET encoded_url = 'aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91Z3Vhcy5jb20=' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, base64URLDecode('aHR0cHM6Ly9nb29nbGUuY29t') AS decoded_url FROM test_base64;
